titleStmt.title: SII 16.210: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 210. (A.R. No. 104 of 1913.) RĀYADRUG, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the walls of the central shrine of the Mādhavarāyasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to 1556 A.D., May 24, (Sunday), °29, when there was a lunar eclipse.

Records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Viṭṭhalarāju Tirumalayyadēvamahārāju who is said to have obtained Rāyadurga-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king, remitted the taxes unjustly collected in the agrahāras of Rāyadurga-sīma by the Hasāṇidyagāṇḍlu (?) and made over the fines collected in the agrahāras as gifts to the temples in the respective agrahāras from which they were collected. These gifts were made on the full-moon day of Mahā Vaiśākha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1478 Agunanēṭi naḷa saṁvatsara jēṣṭa śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivamaharāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhva sanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāṁbrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju viṭhalarāju tirumalayyadēvamahārājulugāru śrīmadya janādiṣaṭkarmaniratalaina rāyadurgānaku cellē
ṭi śīmalōni Agrahārāla AśēṣavidvaNmahājanālaku daṁḍaṁpeṭṭi yiccina śilāśāsana dharma śāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu . sadāśivamahārāyalu māku
nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina rāyadurgānaku cellēṭi sīmalōni Agrahārālaku nēmu sarvamānyaṁśēsina vivaraṁ mī Agrahārālaṁdu haśāṇidyagāṁḍlu A
ṁnyāyaṁśēśi tīśiko [Aḍi] nārani mīru mātō ceppagānē mā lekhalu parāmariśiṁci mī Agrahārālaṁdu mīru talārikānaku [Acci mākunu] veṭṭivē
māni mīmī Agrahārālaṁdu kṣētravibhāgāluśēśi Aṁduku puccukonucuṁḍē kāṇikaluṁnu yivi mōdalainavi mānitimi . mīmī Agrahārāla
ṁdu tappucēśinavārivallavaccina Aparādhaṁ māku yēyē Agrahārālaṁdu vacceno ĀĀ [A*]grahārālaṁdē dēvastānaṁ cervukuṁṭa kāluvalaku ni
rukaṭṭaṁgānu mīkē kaṭṭaḍaśēstimi yivi mōdalainavi Anniṁni viṭhalarājayyavāriki puṇyaṁ gānu mahāvaiśākha śu 15 puṇyakālamaṁdu
dārapōśi yiccina sarvamānya dharmaśilāśāsanaṁ . yī dharmānaku yavvaru tappinānu tama mātāpitṛlanu kāśilōnu vadhiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvā
ru . gōbrāhmalanu vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvuvāru . Ani yiccina dharmaśilāśāsanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō hareti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
